allow: PowerShell(try { $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\('127.0.0.1', 8888\); $s = $tcp.GetStream\(\); $r = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($s\); $w = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($s\); $w.AutoFlush = $true; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; Write-Host "WELCOME:" $r.ReadLine\(\); $w.WriteLine\('PUT city Shanghai'\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; Write-Host "PUT:" $r.ReadLine\(\); $w.WriteLine\('GET city'\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; Write-Host "GET:" $r.ReadLine\(\); $w.WriteLine\('DELETE city'\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; Write-Host "DELETE:" $r.ReadLine\(\); $w.WriteLine\('GET city'\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; Write-Host "GET\(nil\):" $r.ReadLine\(\); $w.WriteLine\('BADCMD'\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; Write-Host "UNKNOWN:" $r.ReadLine\(\); $w.WriteLine\('EXIT'\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; Write-Host "EXIT:" $r.ReadLine\(\); $tcp.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Host "ERR:" $_ })

PowerShell($job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\('127.0.0.1', 8888\); $s = $tcp.GetStream\(\); $buf = [byte[]]::new\(1024\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $n = $s.Read\($buf, 0, 1024\); $welcome = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($buf, 0, $n\); Write-Output "HELLO: $welcome"; $s.Write\([System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes\("GET key`r`n"\), 0, 8\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $n = $s.Read\($buf, 0, 1024\); $echo = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($buf, 0, $n\); Write-Output "ECHO: $echo"; $tcp.Close\(\) }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Receive-Job $job -Wait; Remove-Job $job -Force 2>$null; Get-Process -Name "main" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force 2>$null)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Git\\bin\\git.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\bin\\git.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "E:\\Git\\bin\\git.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path "E:\\vs\\ucrt64\\bin\\git.exe"\) { Write-Host "found at E:\\vs\\ucrt64\\bin" })
